execution.summary: Align semantAH namespace documentation, schemas, and API behavior around docs, code, chronik, osctx, and insights.

acceptance.assertion: semantAH docs/namespaces.md defines the canonical namespace set and marks vault only as legacy alias if retained.
Namespace schema and API behavior are aligned or any remaining mismatch is explicitly documented.
Tests cover allowed and rejected namespaces or a precise blocker is recorded.
